CustomField.description: IF(Not(ISBLANK(From_Orgwide_Email__c)) , From_Orgwide_Email__c , IF( Subsidiary_Indicator__c = '75201' && (Origin='Email' || Origin='ALD Website'||Origin='Email - manually created') , 'kundservice.se@aldautomotive.com', IF( Subsidiary_Indicator__c = '75201' && (Origin='Email' || Origin='ALD Website'||Origin='Email - manually created'), 'kundservice@nffleet.com', $User.Email ) )
CustomField.formula: IF(Not(ISBLANK(From_Orgwide_Email__c)) , From_Orgwide_Email__c , IF( Subsidiary_Indicator__c = '75201' && (Text(Origin)='Email' || Text(Origin)='ALD Website'||Text(Origin)='Email - manually created'), 'kundservice.se@aldautomotive.com', IF( (Subsidiary_Indicator__c = '75202' && (Text(Origin)='Email' || Text(Origin)='ALD Website'||Text(Origin)='Email - manually created')), 'kundservice@nffleet.com', $User.Email ) ))
CustomField.label: From Orgwide EmailFinal
